steps.note: Wait for casepilot project card to appear
Step 1: Click the casepilot project name on its project card
Step 2: Click the projects-list case name link
Step 3: Wait for the Run history section on the case detail page

steps.selector: #root > div > main > div > div > section:nth-of-type(3) > table > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(1) > td:nth-of-type(1) > code
steps.note: Step 4: Open the first finished run to check for video sections
Scroll down to look for Video section
Navigate back to the case detail page
Wait for case detail page to load

steps.selector: #root > div > main > div > div > section:nth-of-type(3) > table > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(2) > td:nth-of-type(1) > code
steps.note: Step 4: Open second run (4.5s) to check for video section
Step 5: Video section is present with both toggle buttons
Expectation 3a: Download video link is present in optimized mode
Expectation 1b: still on the same run detail page
Expectation 1a: optimized button is highlighted (pressed) when selected
Expectation 1b: video source switched — Download video link points to optimized video
Step 7: Click the original button to switch back
Expectation 2a: original button is now highlighted (pressed) after switching back
Expectation 3b: Download video link is present in original mode
Expectation 2b: step timeline markers visible below the video after switching back to original
